tracks.meaning: to lead or direct someone along a particular route or path
a document or resource that provides instructions or explanations on a topic
a person who leads tourists or visitors through a location and provides information about it
a person who advises or mentors someone through a difficult process or life transition
a tool or software feature that directs a user through a process or application step-by-step
a recorded musical composition or track on an album
to influence or direct someone's behavior or choices subtly
a groove or channel that directs the movement of a body part or substance
